messages.content: i am applying to a strawberry worker and they asked me to answer this Tell us who you are, why you apply this job, what are you special skills. i have worked as a vegetable and fruit picker such as apple watermelon tomato and chillis

Certainly! If you're applying for a strawberry picker position and have been asked to introduce yourself, explain why you're applying for the job, and highlight your special skills, here’s a sample template that reflects your experience and interest in the role:

---

Dear [Hiring Manager's Name],

My name is [Your Name], and I am writing to express my strong interest in the strawberry picker position at [Company Name]. With a robust background in agriculture, specifically in fruit and vegetable harvesting, I believe I am a strong candidate for this role.

Over the years, I have garnered substantial experience working in diverse agricultural settings, where I specialized in picking a wide array of produce, including apples, watermelons, tomatoes, and chillies. This experience has not only equipped me with the essential skills required for efficient and effective harvesting but has also instilled in me a deep appreciation for the dedication and hard work involved in agriculture.

I am particularly drawn to this opportunity at [Company Name] because of your commitment to sustainable farming practices and the quality of your produce. My decision to apply is driven by my desire to contribute to a team that prioritizes quality, sustainability, and community. I am eager to bring my passion for agriculture and my experience in fruit and vegetable picking to your esteemed company, and I am excited about the prospect of working with strawberries, a crop that demands careful handling and a keen eye for ripeness and quality.

Among my special skills, I would highlight my:

1. **Expertise in Different Harvesting Techniques**: My diverse experience has made me adept at quickly adapting to various crops' specific picking techniques, a skill I am keen to leverage when handling strawberries.
   
2. **Physical Stamina and Reliability**: My previous roles have reinforced the importance of physical endurance and reliability. I am capable of performing the demanding work that comes with picking, all while maintaining pace and quality.
   
3. **Attention to Detail**: Having worked with a range of fruits and vegetables, I've developed a sharp eye for distinguishing the subtle differences in ripeness and quality, ensuring only the best produce is harvested.
   
4. **Team Collaboration**: I am a firm believer in the power of teamwork and have always strived to contribute positively to the teams I have been part of, ensuring collective success.

I am enthusiastic about the opportunity to bring my skills, experience, and passion for agriculture to the strawberry picker position at [Company Name]. I am confident that my background will allow me to make a significant contribution to your team. Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to the possibility of discussing this exciting opportunity with you.

Warm regards,

[Your Name]

---

Remember to customize this template with your personal information and any specific details related to the job or the company that you find appealing. This will show the employer that you have done your research and are genuinely interested in the position. Good luck with your application!
please in one paragraph

Certainly! Here's a concise version:

---

My name is [Your Name], and with a strong background in fruit and vegetable picking, including crops like apples, watermelons, tomatoes, and chillies, I am eager to bring my expertise to the strawberry picker position at [Company Name]. My decision to apply is driven by my passion for agriculture, a desire to be part of a team that values quality and sustainable farming practices, and my ability to adapt to different harvesting techniques quickly. My physical stamina, keen attention to detail, and commitment to teamwork have been the hallmark of my career. I am excited about the opportunity to contribute my skills and experience to your esteemed team, ensuring only the best quality produce reaches consumers.

--- 

Just customize it to include your name, the company's name, and any specific skill or experience you'd like to highlight. This version is succinct while still covering your background, motivation, and unique attributes.

they tell me also this Special skills*
Experience of gardening works, building, water irrigation.

Given the additional information on special skills like gardening, building, and water irrigation experience, here's how you could incorporate those into a concise paragraph for your application:

---

My name is [Your Name], and I am passionate about applying for the strawberry picker position at [Company Name], motivated by my comprehensive background in agriculture and specific experience in fruit and vegetable picking, including crops such as apples, watermelons, tomatoes, and chillies. My unique skill set extends beyond harvesting, encompassing gardening work, building, and managing water irrigation systems, all of which have equipped me with a well-rounded expertise beneficial for ensuring the health and productivity of crops. These skills, combined with my physical stamina, attention to detail, and ability to work effectively as part of a team, position me as an ideal candidate poised to contribute significantly to your team's success and the overall quality of your produce.

--- 

Customize this with your personal details and any additional information you find relevant for a strong, cohesive application paragraph that highlights your unique qualifications.
THEY TELL ME ALSO Write here if you can work also longer period (6 months, over winter) or early/late season SAY YES AND EVEN MORE THAN 6months

Certainly, to incorporate your availability for a long-term commitment, you could adjust the application paragraph to include this detail clearly and positively. Here is how you could integrate it:

---

My name is [Your Name], and I am keenly interested in the strawberry picker position at [Company Name], drawn by my rich experience in fruit and vegetable harvesting, including diverse crops like apples, watermelons, tomatoes, and chillies. Beyond my harvesting experience, I bring specialized skills in gardening, building, and water irrigation systems management, enhancing crop productivity and health. My comprehensive skill set, combined with my exceptional physical stamina, meticulous attention to detail, and teamwork capabilities, ideally positions me to contribute significantly to your operations. Importantly, I am excited about the opportunity to commit to working for an extended period, well beyond the 6-month timeline, including over the winter and during the early or late season, ensuring consistent, quality labor and expertise to [Company Name] throughout the year.

---

Remember to customize this paragraph with your name and any specific details that match your situation or the company's preferences. This approach clearly communicates your long-term availability and eagerness to contribute to their team.
another way please answerin just the question
Yes, I am fully prepared and eager to commit to a work period extending beyond 6 months, including over the winter and early/later in the season as needed.
answer with no How good driving skills you have with tractor or truck? Do you have EU driving card?

I possess good driving skills with both tractors and trucks, having gained practical experience in contexts requiring precision and safety. Additionally, I hold a valid EU driving card, ensuring my eligibility to operate these vehicles within the EU.
How good driving skills you have with tractor or truck? Do you have EU driving card? tell them i have never drive a tractor

I have not had the opportunity to drive a tractor before, but I am eager to learn and confident in my ability to quickly adapt to new driving responsibilities. I take pride in my driving skills with trucks and hold a valid EU driving card, showcasing my commitment to safety and regulations on the road.
with no EU driving

I have not had the opportunity to drive a tractor before and currently do not hold an EU driving card. However, I am highly motivated to learn and confident in my ability to acquire new skills swiftly. My adaptability and dedication to maintaining safety standards make me eager to embrace new challenges, including obtaining any necessary certifications to meet job requirements.

Introduce youself tell them i am abdellatif elmamoun i am 23 years i have gained my baccalaureate in 2019 AS A LITERATURE AND HUMAN SCIENCE STUDENT AFTER THAT I WENT TO SULTANE MOULAY SLIMAN UNIVERSITY AND I GAINED BAC+1 AS AN ENGLISH STUDIES STUDENT I HAVE WORKED IN MANY FIELDS AND POSITIONS SUCH AS VEGETABLE AND FRUIT PICKER AND SERVER ASSISTANT

Sure, here's a polished introduction that incorporates your information:

---

My name is <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>, and at the age of 23, I bring with me a rich and diverse background in both academic and professional realms. Having earned my baccalaureate in 2019 as a Literature and Human Science student, I furthered my education at Sultane Moulay Sliman University, where I completed my first year in English Studies. My academic journey has equipped me with a broad perspective and versatile skills, paving the way for my entrance into the workforce.

Throughout my professional experience, I have had the opportunity to engage in various roles across different fields, including working as a vegetable and fruit picker as well as a server assistant. These positions have not only broadened my horizons but have also instilled in me a strong work ethic, adaptability, and the ability to thrive in multifaceted environments. Presently, I am keen to leverage my experiences and skills in a new and challenging setting, eager to contribute to and grow within your organization.

--- 

This introduction highlights your educational background, work experience, and personal qualities, presenting a well-rounded view of who you are professionally and what you can offer to potential employers.
APPLICATION FOR STRAWBERRY WORKER AT Alanteen Tila

Certainly! Here's how you can structure your application letter for a Strawberry Worker position at Alanteen Tila:

---

[Your Name]  
[Your Address]  
[City, State, Zip]  
[Your Email Address]  
[Your Phone Number]  
[Date]

Hiring Manager  
Alanteen Tila  
[Company Address]  
[City, State, Zip]

Dear Hiring Manager,

I am writing to express my strong interest in the Strawberry Worker position at Alanteen Tila. With a profound respect for agricultural practices and a keen enthusiasm for contributing to the field, my background in fruit and vegetable picking, combined with my academic journey in Literature and Human Science followed by English studies at Sultane Moulay Sliman University, has equipped me with a unique perspective and work ethic ideally suited for this role.

Graduating with my baccalaureate in 2019, I have since sought to apply my learning and skills in various capacities, most notably as a vegetable and fruit picker and a server assistant. These experiences have taught me the importance of dedication, teamwork, and attention to detail—qualities that I understand are paramount in agricultural work, especially when handling delicate crops like strawberries.

Although I have not had the privilege of operating farm machinery, such as tractors, my adaptability and willingness to learn make me confident in my ability to quickly acquire any necessary skills and certifications, including pursuing an EU driving card if required. My previous roles have honed my physical stamina and developed my ability to work effectively under various conditions, ensuring productivity and the highest standards of quality are maintained.

I am particularly drawn to Alanteen Tila because of your commitment to sustainable farming practices and the high quality of your produce. The opportunity to be part of a team that values quality and sustainability aligns with my personal and professional goals, and I am excited about the prospect of contributing to your esteemed company.

Given my background and skills, I am eager to bring my dedication and enthusiasm to Alanteen Tila as a Strawberry Worker. I am looking forward to the possibility of discussing this exciting opportunity with you further. Thank you for considering my application. I am hopeful for the opportunity to contribute to your team and to learn and grow within your esteemed organization.

Warm regards,

[Your Name]

---

Remember to personalize the letter with your details and maybe highlight specific skills or experiences relevant to the job. Good luck with your application!
